jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at BLK-Max Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BLK-Max Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About BLK-Max Hospital:
BLK-Max Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BLK-Max Hospital!
